name: SINOPEC Shandong Taishan Pectroleum Co.,Ltd.
summary: SINOPEC Shandong Taishan Pectroleum Co.,Ltd. purchases and sells petroleum oil products in China. The company's principal products include gasoline, diesel oil, lubricating oil, and other petrochemicals. It is also involved in the supply of natural gas. The company is based in Taian, China.
